introSection: Children's Roller Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Holiday World & Splashin' Safari in Santa Claus, Indiana, USA. It existed during the 1960s.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Footage of this roller coaster on YouTube

fullText:
Children's Roller Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Holiday World & Splashin' Safari in Santa Claus, Indiana, USA. It existed during the 1960s.






 * Footage of this roller coaster on YouTube
